creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to rkoberman from comment #2)
Oh, crap! I'm an idot. You don't need to edit anything. Just re-build and re-install harfbuzz-icu:
cd /usr/pot/print/harfbuzz-icu
make
make deinstall
make reinstall

Than update the port(s) that failed. Just do a 'make' without cleaning first. If you use portmaster, use the -C option to not clean. The link to harbuzz-icu is at the very end of build and thi can save n hour or to in  monster like the webkits.
